dashboard.description: AntiAtropos SRE Environment Overview - AWS Deployment. Import the full dashboard from deploy/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/json/antiatropos-overview.json via the AMG UI (Dashboards > Import > Upload JSON file). After import, change the data source from the local Prometheus (UID: PBFA97CFB590B2093) to your AMP workspace data source.

options.content:
## Import Instructions

This is a placeholder panel. Import the full dashboard from:

```
deploy/grafana/provisioning/dashboards/json/antiatropos-overview.json
```

via the AMG UI: **Dashboards > Import > Upload JSON file**

After import, change the data source from the local Prometheus (UID: `PBFA97CFB590B2093`) to your AMP workspace data source.

dashboard.title: AntiAtropos Overview (AWS)
